title: Candy and the Pizza Ggirl
overview: Candy and the Pizza Ggirl is A Hindi Movie.

title: Archival: The Hampton Inheritance
overview: Marigold Finch boards a train headed to the mysterious Chekhol Institute, a secret academy devoted to preserving "forbidden books deemed too dangerous for society". This institute is filled with eccentric rich-kid scholars known as Archivists – a group gifted with the creative power and training needed to enter story worlds and live inside them. Marigold knows that her brother Sebastian, who disappeared a few years ago, was accepted to the same archivist program before he went missing. When she discovers that Sebastian has been trapped inside an unfinished mystery novel called The Hampton Inheritance, Marigold ventures inside to save him before it's too late.

title: Pig Earth
overview: Pig Earth traces a sequence of conditions through which consciousness emerges, organises, and ultimately fractures under its own weight. It follows the slow organisation of mind from instinct into structure, from structure into consciousness, only for this awareness to rupture, turning back upon the organism that hosts it. If evolution tends toward efficiency, then consciousness appears excessive. If it tends toward survival, then consciousness appears compromised. The conscious animal becomes the animal that hesitates, the animal that suffers its own awareness, the animal for whom existence is no longer given but must be continually reckoned with. In this sense, consciousness may be less a culmination than a misstep: not the enlightenment of the organism, but its undoing.

title: Daydreaming So Vividly About Our Spanish Holidays
overview: Hungry for sun, light and warmth, a group of teenagers embark on a dream trip to the Balearic Islands.

title: The Clock Maker
overview: Upon the glade, the Clock Maker confronts the Time Thief after hunting him for a very long time.

title: Seaper Powers: The Rescue
overview: Emma is back in the Caribbean after being summoned by Marty (merman) and Oliver (octopus). Their friend Steve (starfish), along with all starfish are dying from a deadly disease. Emma must find a cure before it's too late.

title: Cagüeira
overview: After committing an act of revenge, Katya experiences the first symptoms of her transformation.

title: The Botanist
overview: In a remote village in Xinjiang, a young Kazakh boy named Arsin, who finds solace in the company of plants. He soon meets Meiyu, a spirited Han girl whose unpredictable nature reminds him of a rare, otherworldly plant. As their friendship blossoms, it deepens into a delicate, dreamlike allegory that blurs the lines between reality and the enchanting world of botany.

title: Hansel and Gretel
overview: A comedic music take on the classic Grimm’s fairytale.

title: Petrushka
overview: Petya is almost 40 years old, he works as a chef in a restaurant and by his age he had achieved little in life. Petya has a wife and two children, but he is not respected by them. One day, he goes to his parents cottage, where he finds a box of old toys. Among them, he finds his favorite toy, Petrushka, because his name is the same as his own. Petya puts Petrushka on his arm, and a miracle happens - the toy comes to life. Now Petya has a difficult struggle with his alter ego, which will make him a real man.

title: Сказочные выходные
overview: An ordinary Russian family goes to a digital detox hotel in the Murom region on the day when hordes of fabulous monsters suddenly begin to materialize in the real world. The only weapon against them is a mobile application.

title: To and From
overview: When an eight year old girl discovers magical stamps that make her every written wish come true, she goes on an adventure to convince a grumpy post office receptionist that Christmas magic is real.

title: Guided Tour
overview: Zuania, an island in the Puerto Rico archipelago and former US military test site, has become a popular Caribbean tourist destination. Beatriz guides them through streets populated by wild horses and into a prohibited irradiated zone. Alba Jaramillo composes a captivating speculative essay to evoke a decolonisation that never happened.

title: Asteria
overview: Jeremy and Tom Fidgerald are two conspiracy-minded cousins ​​and beekeepers who believe the company they work for is a front for aliens who are exploiting Earth's resources. Jeremy and his cousin take action on climate change, kidnapping the company's CEO to force her to admit she's an alien and establish contact with their mothership. The short film addresses the exploitation of resources by large corporations and encourages people to take climate action, even though it's not always possible.

title: Turisti
overview: A routine work trip for married couple Hana and Kornel suddenly turns into an adventurous struggle for survival. In a remote forest, far from civilization, they are forced to face not only the wilderness, but also the fragile terrain of their long-term, stagnant relationship.

title: Kamen Rider Gavv: Final Stage
overview: Kamen Rider Gavv: Final Stage is the stage show of Kamen Rider Gavv.

title: Up in Heaven
overview: At his grandmother’s funeral, a four-year-old boy is told the dead become angels in heaven. Hoping to retrieve her, he becomes a pilot and searches in a small plane. Finding her on a cloud, he ties her to bring her home, but she refuses and a guardian angel rescues her.

title: Adventures of the Yellow Suitcase
overview: The contents of the Wonderful Doctor’s yellow suitcase cure not only colds and the flu, but also sadness, loneliness, cowardice, and timidity. Petya is a modern, reclusive boy who refuses to go outside; he is afraid of society and other children. His parents decide to turn to the Wonderful Doctor, but his magic suitcase is stolen. From that moment on, a series of adventures begins.

title: Shower Thoughts
overview: A man takes a shower and is surprised to find out that all of his “shower thoughts,” normal and strange, have become a reality.

title: Mythos
overview: An Anthology about Greek Mythology from the point of view of a college student who's trying to save his grade. Going through stories such as Pandora's Box, Nymph, Narcissus, Orpheus and Eurydice, and finally Theseus. Each one reflecting how Mythology might not be history, but examples of who we are as people.

title: A Story About Fire
overview: The legend of Ran Bi Wa talks about a monkey who was raised by humans. When he sets off to the Holy Mountain to steal fire for humankind, a journey begins from which he will return transformed into a man.

title: Meet Saybika
overview: Ye, who had always had the same dreams, begins having diverse dreams after accidentally discovering a mysterious dictionary. Realizing that she was receiving signals from someone every time she opened the dictionary, Ye discovers that her dreams were actually signals from Rainy.

title: The Monkey Hero
overview: Once upon a time in a land far, far away, Tang Sanzang set out on a journey with Monkey King Jazz and Sha Wujing—However, one member was missing from their group: Zhu Baji.

title: Snorp: My Alien Friend 2
overview: Continuation of the adventures of the alien, sequel to the film "Zhdun".

title: 77 Minutes
overview: Director Kim hasn't made a film in a decade. The lead of her first short appears as a spirit: "You stopped filming—and I aged." Betting her life savings on a 77-minute feature, she searches for a vanished actress. Reality and fantasy blur until the God of Film appears... "Why do I love you?"

title: Doremi Dalimi the Movie: Sing-Along Party
Capybara
overview: Full animated capybara movie. Plot TBA

title: Swapped
overview: A tiny woodland creature and a majestic bird suddenly swap bodies, forcing them to team up to survive the wildest adventure of their lives.

title: A Road Trip to the Moon
overview: Four childhood friends go on a life-changing drive to the moon in a stolen car.

title: Bend Sinister
overview: An atheistic, musical/cinematic rendition of the beginning of the Bible through the lens of a vengeful and bloodthirsty Eve.

title: Mortal Kombat II
overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

title: Shurale
overview: Aysha is preparing for the wedding, but suddenly learns that her brother Timur has disappeared. In search of her brother, the girl returns to her native village, where she encounters not only her own past, but also a secret hidden in the depths of the forest.

title: Love Bites
overview: After a young peasant is spurned by her vampiric lover, she embarks on a blood-soaked odyssey that spans centuries.

title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
overview: A lonely elderly widow named Tova forms an unlikely friendship with a curmudgeonly cephalopod octopus named Marcellus, but unbeknownst to her, Marcellus is on a mission to solve a mystery that will heal the widow’s heart and lead her to a life-changing discovery.

title: The Irregular at Magic High School THE MOVIE - Yotsuba Succession Arc -
overview: The invitation has arrived. It's time for the New Year's Reception at the Yotsuba family residence. This year, Miyuki and other candidates will gather there to decide who will be the next leader of their powerful clan. If chosen as successor, she would never again have to see her brother live as an outcast. At the same time, such a position would surely entail a political marriage, leaving her mind in complete turmoil. To complicate matters, the current head of the family sows doubt with a shocking statement. When the new year arrives, their relationship may change forever...

title: Threadbare
overview: A boy crowns himself as king, unaware his kingdom is already losing someone.

title: It's Time to Grow Up
overview: In a secluded castle, Margaret, a highly sensitive young girl, lives peacefully with her mother, Helen. On the evening of her twentieth birthday, Helen invites Margaret's grandmother, Agatha, for dinner. As the sun sets and the young girl lies on a tablecloth in the garden, a phrase written in an open notebook beside her, once whispered by her grandmother, suddenly catches her attention: "It's Time to Grow Up".

title: Good Omens 3
overview: The conclusion to the Good Omens story.

title: Conni and the Mystery of the Crane
overview: While her parents are traveling, Conni experiences an exciting adventure at home with cat Mau, her friends, Grandpa Willi, a stuffy neighbor – and an injured crane, who urgently needs help. Will Conni and her friends manage to get crane Klaus to fly south with the migrating birds in time?

title: Karuppu
overview: In a world where justice falters, a powerful guardian awakens. A superhuman rises in a rotten world to set things right in this high-octane fantasy entertainer.

title: Disco Hall Commitments
overview: "(...)the most important event of my day has been remembering the improbable adventure of H.K: 5000 years after the first kalaallit expedition, renowned and reviled archaeologist Herbjørg Kristofferson tries to lift up an ambitious budget for a reckless expedition to the Secret Pavilion of Monk Ko-Hu, near the Russian Arctic"

title: Bogatyrs
overview: Ancient Rus. The hero Svyatogor defeated the evil Sorcerer who wanted to conquer Rus - to do this, he used magic to turn into a Dragon. Svyatogor hid three artifacts (the claw, eye, and vein of the Dragon) in the modern world so that evil would never return. But because of the schoolboy Vanya, the Sorcerer's beloved enters our time. She wants to find these artifacts, resurrect the Dragon, and bring her betrothed back to life. Together with two heroes from ancient Rus, Vanya must find the villain and prevent her from carrying out her plan.

title: Onades
overview: Álvaro returns to his Mediterranean hometown to sell the family house. There, the Mediterranean comes alive and guides him through legends, customs and memories, on an intimate journey where past and present intertwine. Onades is a contemporary fable about identity, nostalgia and desire, a poetic and queer short film created from and for La Vila.

title: Dance of the Damned
overview: From the universe of Qodrat (2022).

title: Rao Bahadur
overview: A demon haunts a mansion in the 1970s as India changes and the aristocracy fades.

title: Office of Magical Forces
overview: 11-year-old Yurko and Mia accidentally stumble upon a mysterious entrance to Otherworldly Kyiv, which has existed since 482. Funny mystical characters come to life in the center of a modern metropolis, and the main characters find themselves in the midst of magical adventures.

title: Mononoke the Movie: Chapter III - The Curse of the Serpent
overview: Third installment of the Mononoke movie trilogy.

title: Pig That Survived Foot-and-Mouth Disease
overview: A pig wanting to be a human is ready to give it his all, whatever the cost. A human wanting to be an animal is ready to give up everything.

title: Nightmares Unleashed 2: Joseph's Revenge
overview: The Nightmare Never Ends as Raven must face her nightmares one last time, however Joseph knows how she is and is pulling out all the stops this time to finally claim his prize...Raven herself.

title: Spirits Talk
overview: A grieving woman’s reality and memories begin to blur as her adoptive mother, Mother Nikki, reaches out to her from the spirit realm. She must speak to her mother one last time—or risk losing the ability to love herself and others.

title: Monkey Boy
overview: Frank is a successful comic book author who is struggling to reinvent himself. His series is no longer selling, and his publisher is pushing him to move on. But Frank lives with Monkey Boy, the main character from his series, and he doesn’t know how to let him go.

title: Masters of the Universe
overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

title: Sleep No More
overview: Two sisters deal with the sudden death of their mother at a wig factory. One believes it was suicide while the other is certain it was a result of possession and takes a job at the factory to uncover the truth. Meanwhile, their brother - born with an eerie gift to regenerate his own body - catches the attention of a ghostly figure roaming the factory, searching for a vessel to inhabit.

title: Todo: Beneath the Flower
overview: Rendered in PS1-style 3D, Todo: Beneath the Flower follows a masked wanderer travelling through a surreal, low-poly world in search of the secret that blooms beneath a single flower.

title: Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle: Movie Release Commemorative Special
overview: A televised special to commemorate the theatrical release of Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle, commeorating the 35th anniversary of the Super Sentai franchise.

title: DRUID
overview: 60 AD. Romans tighten their grip on Britannia. Druidism is hunted almost to extinction. after being driven out of their commune, Rhiain- a young druid and her master Gwen are forced to flee and traverse the wilds of Britannia in order to reach the sanctuary of the Druids - Ynys Môn. On their journey they will encounter great challenges and unlikely allies on a quest that will decide not only their survival, but the future of their way of life itself.

title: Garuda: Dare to Dream
overview: Putra, a 13-year-old boy with asthma, dreams of playing for Indonesia's national team. Lacking skill but never passion, he joins trials at Sanca Perkasa Soccer School—only to face ridicule from Aldo, who mocks his weak body and failed attempts. Crushed, Putra retreats to a field near the cemetery to play with friends, where Aldo challenges them again. In the middle of the match, Putra suddenly collapses—and awakens in another realm. There, he meets Gaga, a glowing Garuda spirit who gifts him a mystical jersey, unlocking incredible speed, power, and skill. Can he rise above doubt and ridicule to become the footballer he longs to be?

title: Beyond Files
overview: Case files document encounters with alien forces and altered realities, uncovering a pattern beyond human understanding.

title: Cartório das Almas
overview: Laura, a “young woman” of 126 years old, is the newly hired at Notary of Souls. In her new role, she records the motivations of those who renounced eternity. However, by contract, Laura herself cannot interrupt her tedious existence.

title: Chuckle Chuckle
overview: Aiming to become comedians, Sahara and his comedy partner Setoguchi work together on their act, "Ultrasweet Sourpork", until unfortunate circumstances lead to their disbandment. Hindered by roadblocks on the path to success, Sahara suddenly encounters an "ideal" version of himself—an ultra-famous comedian. Boasting rich knowledge for success as a comedian, this "ideal" Sahara begins meddling with the real Sahara's life.

title: Adgwa-Ata
overview: Abducted by a jungle tribe to undergo a brutal initiation, three teenage girls enter a divine realm where taming giant snakes – their totem animals – becomes a rite of passage into adulthood.

title: Minions & Monsters
overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

title: Judge Michael - Rise of the Law
overview: A new enemy has risen on mega city one, his name is Voss Kane " The Ripper " bringing chaos to the streets, now a new judge has emerged from the hall of justice teached by Dredd himself, to uphold the law and bring justice to the streets.

title: The Boy at the Edge of the World
overview: Omul lives with his family on a remote island in the Fire Archipelago. During a beach trip, a storm sweeps Omul and his younger sister Kimi into the sea, where Omul witnesses a mysterious creature threatening Kimi’s soul.  Rescued by a whale, the siblings survive, but Kimi is left in a coma. Omul’s ability to talk to animals becomes crucial as he and his brother – who blames him for the accident – set out to find Sadumea, the mythical figure behind Kimi’s torment.  With their dog Tela, they embark on a dangerous expedition deep into the island to save Kimi…

title: A Great Sailor
overview: A sailor has a lucky catch

title: Chasing Shadows
overview: Heather invites her new friends over for a sleepover of secrets and face masks. But soon, her mistreatment of those around her comes back with a haunting grin, and nowhere to run.

title: Naxos
overview: On a research trip to Greece, Adam slips into a parallel life without marriage, children, or responsibility. With Nysa, a local, he drifts through enchanted freedom while haunted by the life he once took for granted.

title: Ananya's Call
overview: Faced with an impossible encounter in her own home, a young woman must race against time to stop a tragedy that defies the laws of nature.

title: Red Anorak
overview: A film director has a mysterious relationship with a figure wearing a memorable red anorak.

title: Moana
overview: Prompted by a summons from the ocean, Moana departs her home island of Motunui for the first time and travels past its barrier reef. Accompanied by the demigod Maui, she undertakes a voyage aimed at recovering the well-being of her community.

title: Unanswered//butterfly: Sword Art Online
overview: The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality. Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party... was the Black Swordsman! Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

title: The Odyssey
overview: Odysseus, the legendary Greek king of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War, chronicling his encounters with mythical beings such as the Cyclops Polyphemus, the Sirens, and the witch-goddess Circe, while attempting to reunite with his wife, Penelope.

title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain - Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work with Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.

title: La Fille dans les nuages
overview: The adventures of a young girl named Providence, who is entrusted with a magic quill that makes everything she writes come true. Faced with this incredible power, she has to choose between living her dreams and saving the world.

title: Kids' Festival! All the Heroes of Justice Appear
overview: Kids' Festival! All the Heroes of Justice Appear was a televised celebration of tokusatsu heroes in 1976.

title: Viana – The Legend of the Golden Hearts
overview: In the north of medieval Portugal, the beautiful Ana falls in love with Thomas, a poor artisan. Her father immediately forbids their union, demanding that his daughter’s suitors produce a jewel as proof of their nobility. But the young couple refuse to give up. With the help of their faithful companions, the generosity of the townswomen and the talent of a mysterious jewellery maker, Ana and Thomas will face many challenges out of love, including the powerful and evil Duke of Aragon.

title: Cakey Heaven
overview: On the morning of her childhood dog’s 13th birthday, Florrie is hard at work in the kitchen, preparing the perfect surprise for her senior terrier, Coco Merrytail - one final, wordless celebration of a bond that’s nearing its soft, inevitable fade.

title: Shiranui
overview: Summer 1996 – Minato, a 10-year-old boy, is neglected by his alcoholic father and keeps to himself at home in a town by the sea. His only source of solace is Ben-chan, a girl goddess that appears on Benten Island. As Minato faces a new life in an orphanage and a painful parting from Ben-chan, he makes a wish to Shiranui for her. However, growing hatred toward his father gradually turns the wish into a malicious "curse" against him…

title: My Armor
overview: A story of April, whose inability to express her grief to her mother leads to a surreal confrontation with a Knight.

title: Soul Trader
overview: A despondent soul arrives in a strange place where he must confront his (mostly) inner demons.

title: The Unknown
overview: See you soon 40 years old, David Zimmerman is a photographer but no one knows. While he almost never leaves home, friends drag him to a crazy party. He spots a woman in the crowd, can't take his eyes off her, follows her... In the middle of the night, his life changes. David wakes up... in the body of the unknown.

title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie -Walpurgisnacht: Rising-
overview: After the events of Rebellion, the world appears to be in balance—but that peace is fragile. As a new threat connected to Walpurgisnacht emerges, Homura Akemi is forced to face the consequences of her choices and question how far she is willing to go to protect Madoka.

title: Onethong
overview: A modern-day woman finds herself transported into the body of Onethong, a character in the literary world of Khun Chang Khun Phaen. She must survive and find a way to escape the tragic fate of the character, who is destined to face execution.

title: Jessica Frost
overview: Pursued by a ruthless, time-jumping psychopath and his squad of assassins, a young woman plagued by family secrets must journey through the desert and beyond the boundaries of reality to find out who she really is and claim her destiny.
